title: lippia gratissima
intro: Lippia gratissima, also known as African tea or wild tea, is a plant species in the verbena family that is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Lippia gratissima include reducing fever, relieving headaches and colds, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
